levels.name: Arabic Letters
levels.description: Foundational recognition and preparation for proper reading.

levels.name: Reading Practice
levels.description: Build fluency and consistent reading progression from the foundations.

levels.name: Tajweed Foundation
levels.description: Systematic articulation and rule foundations as taught in qualified tajweed approaches.

levels.name: Quran Recitation Improvement
levels.description: Integrate rules into real recitation practice with targeted corrections.

levels.name: Memorization
levels.description: Stabilize reading quality while memorizing using structured review and assessment.

levels.name: Advanced Recitation
levels.description: Higher precision and consistency within the authenticated scope of materials.

notes: Curriculum units are structural. Actual explanations/rules must be ingested from approved scholar sources with provenance before AI can present them.
